title: Fermented Saudi Kookoora Stir-Fry
description: A lazy-sunday dish featuring salt cod in a fermented sauce with a crisp texture and egg-free-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Sauce Base
ingredients.notes: A blend of fermented spices and vegetables for flavoring

ingredients.name: Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Fermented green beans, already prepared (use sparingly)

instructions: Heat a wok over medium-high heat.
Add oil to the wok and swirl it around for even coverage.
Place the salt cod in the wok and cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Add the sauce base and vegetables to the wok. Stir-fry for an additional minute or until the vegetables start to soften slightly.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
